CustomField.description: Provides a clickable link to the Agent associated with the related insurance policy.
CustomField.formula: IF( !ISBLANK(Policy_Number__r.Agent__c), HYPERLINK( '/lightning/r/Account/' & Policy_Number__r.Agent__c & '/view', Policy_Number__r.Agent__r.FirstName & ' ' & Policy_Number__r.Agent__r.LastName ) , NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the Agent linked to the insurance policy for this commission line. Click the link to open the Agent record. This field is system-generated and read-only.
CustomField.label: Agent For Insurance
